description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier - discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Live public-process control surface for ORGAN-V: org profile, community-health defaults, intake templates, pipeline heartbeat, distribution experiment record, signal triage ritual, and external-validation/revenue ledgers.
ranked.first_task: Close the stale W14 top-of-funnel reach loop by adding a reach ledger or issue template that records source, action, owner, target date, and shipped link, then update docs/signals-triage/triage-log.md so reach remediation is tracked with the same SLA discipline as conversion fixes.
